src/main/java/com/idealo/CheckoutApplica.general_idea: Remove deprecated Springfox Swagger 2 annotation and import to align with Spring Boot 3.x which uses SpringDoc by default.
src/main/java/com/idealo/CheckoutApplica.why_exists: The 'springfox' library is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE namespace) and will cause runtime errors or classpath conflicts; removing it is necessary for the application to start.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/api/Ba.general_idea: Replace deprecated javax.validation imports with Jakarta EE equivalents required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/api/Ba.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile without jakarta.validation.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/api/Ba.general_idea: Remove unused import for RequestMethod as it is no longer used.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor in favor of implicit constructor injection.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/facade.general_idea: Remove redundant @Autowired annotation from constructor injection to align with Spring Boot 3.x best practices.
Remove unused import for @Autowired annotation after its removal from the constructor.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/I.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/d.general_idea: Migrate the Nullable annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE standards in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/d.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available by default in Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 environments; using it causes a compile error (class not found).

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/d.general_idea: Migrate the NotNull validation constraint from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE standards in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/d.why_exists: The javax.validation package is no longer available by default in Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 environments; using it causes a compile error (class not found).

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Bas.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Bas.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Ite.general_idea: Migrate the Nullable annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE standards in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Ite.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available by default in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or compilation error if the javax dependency is removed.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Ite.general_idea: Migrate the NotNull validation constraint from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE standards in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Ite.why_exists: The javax.validation package is no longer available by default in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or compilation error if the javax dependency is removed.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Spe.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Spe.why_exists: javax.validation package is not available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments required by Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Comment out the deprecated 'features' property for embedded MongoDB as it is no longer supported in newer versions.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.after:
# This property is deprecated: Feature support has been removed from Embedded Mongo. A custom MongodConfig bean should be defined instead.
# features: SYNC_DELAY

src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 imports and annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new testing framework.
src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.runner.RunWith) are not part of the JUnit 5 API; using them with JUnit 5 engine configuration or in a project migrated to JUnit 5 will result in compilation errors or test discovery failures.

src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.general_idea: Replace Spring Test JUnit 4 runner import and annotation with JUnit 5 extension.
src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.why_exists: SpringJUnit4ClassRunner is specific to JUnit 4; it is incompatible with JUnit 5 test execution, causing runtime failures or compilation errors if the JUnit 4 dependency is removed.

src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 Assert.assertThat with static import of Hamcrest's MatcherAssert.assertThat.
src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is part of JUnit 4; if the JUnit 4 dependency is removed during migration, this import will cause a compilation error.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Migrate test runner from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by replacing the @RunWith annotation with @ExtendWith.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner classes are not recognized by JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to execute or be discovered without the JUnit 5 extension.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Update import statements to use JUnit 5 API classes instead of JUnit 4.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.*) are not part of the JUnit 5 API; using them with JUnit 5 annotations causes compilation errors or runtime linkage failures.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Before lifecycle annotation with JUnit 5 @BeforeEach.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize JUnit 4 @Before annotation; setup methods will not be executed, leading to test failures.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Test annotation with JUnit 5 @Test annotation.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: JUnit 5 platform does not recognize JUnit 4 @Test annotation; test methods will not be discovered or executed.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Update assertThat import to use Hamcrest's static import instead of JUnit 4's wrapper.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: While JUnit 4's assertThat often delegates to Hamcrest, explicit migration to Hamcrest static imports ensures compatibility and removes dependency on JUnit 4 assertion wrappers which may be removed or deprecated in strict JUnit 5 environments.
